semantic.role: Draft interface definition serving as a future contract for runtime service capabilities, intended to centralize access to resolved LLM settings, sync, check, and fix services.
responsibilities: Define the contract for a runtime service facade: getResolvedLLMSettings, getSyncService, getCheckService, getFixService.
Act as a placeholder to absorb future runtime orchestration responsibilities, preventing further expansion of provider-resolution code in infra/llm/runtime.ts.
outOfScope: Actual resolution of LLM providers or service instances.
Any logic beyond the interface definition.
invariants: The interface is a draft; all methods return unknown, indicating lack of concrete types.
The file should not be imported or implemented until the draft is stabilized.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Define a draft interface for future runtime service capabilities, preventing further expansion of provider-resolution code in infra/llm/runtime.ts.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of the ArchSpine v1.0.0 architectural governance restructuring; this draft was introduced to prepare for consolidated runtime services without altering existing provider-resolution code.

publicSurface.description: Interface defining the draft contract for a runtime service that provides resolved LLM settings and access to sync, check, and fix services. All methods currently return unknown, indicating the contract is not yet finalized.
